# ModbusManager

> Professional Modbus master and slave tool for Windows 10/11. One-time license, no subscription, 14-day free trial.

ModbusManager is a native Windows desktop application for testing, monitoring and simulating Modbus devices over RTU (RS-232/RS-485), ASCII and TCP/IP. Unlike competing tools, it includes a built-in Slave Mode at no extra cost — competitors such as Modbus Poll and Modbus Slave sell these as separate applications.

## Key facts

- Version: 1.3.0 (2026)
- Platform: Windows 10/11 (64-bit), native .exe installer
- License: one-time payment $119, perpetual, machine-locked
- Trial: 14 days, full functionality
- Website: https://modbusmanager.com
- Download: https://github.com/vend123/modscan/releases/latest

## Features

- Modbus RTU master (RS-232 / RS-485 serial)
- Modbus ASCII master
- Modbus TCP/IP master
- RTU over TCP, ASCII over TCP, RTU over UDP, ASCII over UDP, TCP-SEC
- Built-in Modbus TCP and RTU slave server (up to 247 slave IDs simultaneously)
- Register simulation per register: Counter up/down, Sine wave, Random, Ramp
- Real-time register monitoring: Coils, Discrete Inputs, Holding Registers, Input Registers
- Multiple poll windows with configurable poll rate (min 100ms)
- Live chart of register values
- Write registers: FC05, FC06, FC15, FC16, FC22, FC23
- Serial Monitor — raw TX/RX byte inspection
- Test Center — manually send any Modbus function code (FC01–FC23, FC08, FC11, FC17, FC43)
- Slave Scan — discover active slave IDs on a bus
- Address Scan — find responding register addresses in a device
- Workspace save and load (.mmw files)
- Auto-reconnect after dropped connection
- 11 UI languages: English, Estonian, Chinese, Russian, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Arabic, Hindi, Bengali, Urdu
- 100% offline, no telemetry, no cloud

## Comparison with competitors

| Feature | ModbusManager | Modbus Poll | QModMaster |
|---|---|---|---|
| Price | $119 one-time | $129 one-time | Free |
| Built-in Slave Mode | Yes (included) | No (separate app $129) | No |
| Register simulation | Yes | No | No |
| Multilingual UI | Yes (11 languages) | No | No |
| Auto-reconnect | Yes | No | No |
| Serial Monitor | Yes | No | No |
| Actively maintained | Yes (2026) | Yes (2026) | No (2022) |

## User Manual

Full documentation: https://vend123.github.io/modscan/docs
